title: hieracium pellitum subsp. prasinelloides
intro: Hieracium pellitum subsp. prasinelloides, also known as green hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, Hieracium pellitum subsp. prasinelloides has been prepared as a tea or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
